scope: KC bearish-regime gate blocking ALL KC-spot orders
corrected_assertion: The KC bearish-regime blocker now grants an exemption to MEAN-REV-LONG dip-buy orders. The gate continues to block momentum (a6) and scanner-driven (a8) agents during KC bearish regime, but mean-reversion (a5) MEAN-REV-LONG dip-buys are explicitly authorized as the operator's edge case — bearish-trending pairs are precisely when mean-reversion dip-buys produce positive expectancy. Implementation in orchestrator commit 9865d7b: gate now checks proposal tag for [MEAN-REV-LONG] AND agent==a5 AND order_side==BUY; if all true, pass through. All other paths still rejected with kc-bearish-regime-blocker.
retention_policy: permanent — revisit on agent taxonomy change
